taskSummary: Add the first GOV.UK Frontend migration slice for the journals page by introducing a Nunjucks template shell that uses the shared layout header and footer.
implementationDecisions: The journals page template extends layouts/researchops.njk.
The shared header and footer are provided by the existing layout x-include elements.
The existing journal tab and panel content is preserved for later GOV.UK content review.
The GOV.UK renderer now outputs public/pages/projects/journals/index.html from the new template.
validationAttempted: Confirmed the changed-file list before trace files was limited to the GOV.UK renderer, the new template and the route-state test.
validationNotRun: No local npm, browser or template-render validation was run through the connector path.
residualRisks: Main page content is intentionally not redesigned in this slice.
GitHub Actions should validate rendered output after PR creation.
